input.title: Audio Stem Separator Input
input.description: Provide an audio file URL to separate into stems (vocals, drums, bass, other instruments)

fileUrl.title: Audio File URL
fileUrl.description: URL to an audio file (MP3, FLAC, WAV, OGG, M4A) for stem separation

filePath.title: Local File Path
filePath.description: Local path to an audio file (alternative to fileUrl, for testing)
